# Ring of the Drake

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Unknown |
| Class | Any |

## Description

3=2 is the Starter Upgrade of the Silent's 3=2. The extra card draw is extended to the first 3 turns.

## Notes

### Sources

After fighting a Boss, can be obtained by taking the Touch of Orobas from Orobas. Replaces 3=2.
